subject: RE: FW: Queries
body:

body_html:
are there floor plans... i could give to my architect

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

Andrew Farkas' response to you:

  1. Will resend
  2. Understand - no to dubai
  3. I don't know, but it may be worth the effort. It
    is quite dramatic.

-----Original Message-----
From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com]
Sent: Thursday, January 05, 2006 8:26 PM
To: lesley@nysgllc.com
Subject: Re: FW: Queries

i didn't see the condo info..... no to dubai.....
do you really think that
the space can be used

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

From: Farkas, Andrew [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com]
Sent: Thursday, January 05, 2006 12:54 PM
To: lesley@nysgllc.com
Subject: Queries

  1.   Are you going to come to Dubai for any of

the time between 1/16 and
1/20? If you do NOT go (i.e. if I do not fly with
you) I will leave Sunday
night, 1/15 and return on the flight leaving Dubai
at 1:30am on 1/20.
The flight to Dubai arrives at 8:30pm on 1/16 and
the return flight
lands at JFK at 6:30am on 1/20. Sultan would like
to know so that
appropriate arrangements may be made.

  1.   Any thoughts about the St. Thomas condo

at
Yacht Haven?

  1.   Do you want me to get a space planner

involved in trying to come up
w/ some concepts for a renovation and
reconfiguration of the space on top of 230 Park
Avenue for use as your
office? My guess is that it would cost $25k-$50k
to come up with some
FEASIBLE initial concepts.
